ddls:
CREATE TABLE "buses" (
  "bus_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each bus */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data validation */,
  "modified_on" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last modified */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the bus */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the bus */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner of the bus */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the bus (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the current status of the bus */,
  "year_of_manufacture" TEXT /* Year the bus was manufactured */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the bus */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the bus */,
  "gps_id" TEXT /* ID linking to GPS data for real-time tracking */,
  "odometer_reading" REAL /* Current odometer reading of the bus */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the bus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buses_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bus owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the bus owner */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the owner */,
  "ownership_type" TEXT /* Type of ownership (e.g., private, government) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "bus_id" TEXT /* ID of the bus that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "parts_replaced" TEXT /* List of parts replaced during maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_bus_id FOREIGN KEY ("bus_id") REFERENCES buses ("bus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "status_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the status log */,
  "bus_id" TEXT /* ID of the bus whose status is being logged */,
  "status" TEXT /* New status of the bus */,
  "status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the status change */,
  "logged_by" TEXT /* Person who logged the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_status_logs_bus_id FOREIGN KEY ("bus_id") REFERENCES buses ("bus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "start_location" TEXT /* Starting location of the route */,
  "end_location" TEXT /* Ending location of the route */,
  "estimated_time" TEXT /* Estimated travel time for the route */,
  "route_length" REAL /* Length of the route in kilometers */,
  "number_of_stops" INTEGER /* Number of stops along the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Name of the driver */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Driver's license number */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the driver */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the driver */,
  "employment_date" TEXT /* Date when the driver was employed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "driver_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the assignment */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver assigned to the bus */,
  "bus_id" TEXT /* ID of the bus assigned to the driver */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the assignment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the assignment ended */,
  "shift_details" TEXT /* Details of the shift (e.g., morning, evening) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_assignments_bus_id FOREIGN KEY ("bus_id") REFERENCES buses ("bus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_assignments_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_records" (
  "fuel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the fuel record */,
  "bus_id" TEXT /* ID of the bus for which fuel was purchased */,
  "fuel_date" TEXT /* Date when the fuel was purchased */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of fuel purchased in liters */,
  "cost" REAL /* Total cost of the fuel purchased */,
  "fuel_station" TEXT /* Station where the fuel was purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_records_bus_id FOREIGN KEY ("bus_id") REFERENCES buses ("bus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspections" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection record */,
  "bus_id" TEXT /* ID of the bus being inspected */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the inspection */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the inspection (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Name of the inspector who conducted the inspection */,
  "inspection_type" TEXT /* Type of inspection (e.g., annual, random) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_bus_id FOREIGN KEY ("bus_id") REFERENCES buses ("bus_id")
)
